content.en:
"Start copying the real body, copying the body!"

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's true body copied his body, and it quickly condensed.

Rumble!!!

A powerful aura permeated from the True Body Replica Body, and although it was only the ninth Balance Realm, its true strength far surpassed that of the Cave Light Replica Body of the Dao Realm.

"Hey, my strength hasn't been suppressed???"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He remembered that when he entered the Double Dao Realm, his strength would be greatly suppressed, but he was not suppressed.

"That's right, in terms of realm, I am equivalent to the overlord of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm, not the double Dao realm. In other words, I can fully exert my strength!"

What this meant, he knew very well, even if it was an invincible existence in the Double Dao Realm, here in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, he would be easily killed.

He's truly invincible here!

Of course.

If he encounters a strange thing, he still can't beat it.

"Let's look for resources here!"

Ye Tian began to search again and again, and the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, as the Ninth Strange Land, naturally has a lot of them, and they are all good things, and any kind of resource is precious to the Supreme Dao Realm.

Especially the resources in the depths of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, any one of them is enough to make the first to the Dao realm and the second to the Dao realm crazy.

But it's also really dangerous.

No, not long after Ye Tiancai went deep into here, he came across a strange thing.

......

Airplanes!!!

In the distance, a humanoid phantom appeared, and above the phantom appeared a slender sword, the sword body was filled with countless patterns, exuding a terrifying aura of supreme rules.

"The !! of the Wonders"

Moreover, Ye Tian felt that this supreme Taoist artifact was even more terrifying than the Xuanming Drum.

But what this supreme curiosity is, he doesn't know.

Swish!

Ye Tian was about to escape, but in an instant, his body was completely annihilated.

One hit, instant kill!

"Hoo !!!"

Ye Tian's other true body copy bodies gasped for breath, and their eyes showed a look of horror, "It's such a terrifying and strange thing, my body didn't react, and I was killed directly!"

According to Miao'an, the strange things in the depths of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm are easy to encounter, and it seems that this is really the case.

"Continue to let the real body copy the body and find resources!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After many attempts, he finally found something good.

"The Heavenly Blood Fruit, a good thing!"

Ye Tian found that guarding this Supreme Dao Blood Fruit was a Supreme Dao Black Python, and its strength was no less than that Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian killed the past in an instant.

Seeing that Ye Tian was coming, the Zhidao Black Python revealed hostility and terrifying killing intent.

In an instant.

Countless black mist filled the surroundings, wanting to devour Ye Tian.

At this moment, the supreme rules on Ye Tian's body exploded, forcibly dispersing this black mist.

In an instant, the Supreme Black Python opened its huge mouth, and a black light penetrated.

This black light is the innate supernatural power of the Supreme Dao Black Python - the black evil light, although it is not as good as the supreme Dao supernatural power, but it is not much worse.

The Black Evil Light contains the attack of the Supreme Dao Rules, and if the ordinary Double Supreme Dao Realm is hit, the body will inevitably be shattered.

"Extreme Spear Technique!"

Ye Tian struck hard with a spear in his hand, directly shattering the black light.

Immediately after, Ye Tian went and did not stop, and hit the head of the Zhidao Black Python with a blow.

Click!!!

The head of the Zhidao Black Python cracked open and let out a scream of pain.

Suddenly.

The power of the Supreme Dao Black Python exploded, and countless black lights instantly penetrated hundreds of millions of time and space, and also penetrated Ye Tian's location.

However, Ye Tian was not hit, but relied on the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique and the Supreme Dao Rules to penetrate and leave in time, but he was almost hit.

"What a horrible killing move!"

Ye Tian's heart palpitated, although he could be called invincible in the double Dao realm, but it was only attack power, his body had not yet reached the level of invincibility, if he was hit, he would inevitably be injured.

After the Dao Black Python broke out this blow, his breath was sluggish, and it was obvious that the sequelae of the blow just now were very large.

Swish!

Ye Tian attacked this Supreme Dao Black Python again, directly penetrating the opponent's seven inches, and the power of the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique directly eroded the inside of his body into thousands of holes.

Soon.

This supreme black python was completely killed and fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"Finally kill it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he took all the Supreme Dao Blood Fruits here, and then took away the corpse of the Supreme Dao Black Python, which also had some value.

"The Supreme Dao Blood Fruit has the effect of improving the cultivation of the Dual Supreme Dao Realm and even the Triple Supreme Dao Realm, and with so many Supreme Dao Blood Fruits, I can go one step further in the Ninth Balance Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

If there were more resources similar to the Supreme Dao Blood Fruit, his accumulation in the Ninth Balance Realm would be enough, and then he would be able to impact the First Supreme Dao Realm.

He was looking forward to the day when the real body would replicate and break through.

A few more days passed.

The situation on Miao'an's side is a little bad, and I went to a treasure place, but every time there are losses.

Now, many of the Dao Realms were already in a bad mood, and if they hadn't signed an agreement, they wouldn't have been able to break through the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, otherwise they would have run away a long time ago.

Before you know it, a solstice year has passed.

Perhaps, in normal times, a solstice year is a little retreat, fleeting.

But here, he has been fighting and healing his wounds, and a thousand years seems to be incomparably long.

At this time, there were only thirty-eight Dao Realm under Miao An's command.

Among them, the True River Valley has fallen to six Supreme Dao Realms, and this is still the case when the True River Valley Lord and True Yang deliberately take care of the True River Valley Elders.

The Lord of the True River Valley also regretted it a little, but the matter had come to this point, so he could only continue to walk.

Moreover.

If Miao'an wins the key training quota of Taisu Palace, then everything is worth it.

"Let's go out and fix it first!"

Myoan suggested.

Hearing this, those emotions that had been tense in the Dao Realm were relaxed.

Subsequently, they followed Miao'an out of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

Miao An didn't want to go out either, but a lot of life-saving things were consumed a lot, and the loss was too great, so she wanted to replenish the Dao Realm powerhouse.

Otherwise, she wouldn't want to win one of the six.

However, as soon as he came out, there were Supreme Dao Realm powerhouses who wanted to leave.

"Lord Miao'an, I don't want to enter the Xuanlin Mountain Realm anymore, I'm willing to give up all benefits!" a Yizhong Dao Realm requested.

Among the Supreme Dao Realms present, he was one of the few still alive in the First Supreme Dao Realm.

He felt that the next time he went in, he would probably fall.

He didn't dare to take any chances!

Even if Miao An gave more benefits, he didn't want it, after all, once it fell, no matter how many good things he had, it would be meaningless to him!
